name: customer-freight-app-antigravity
description: Antigravity Codex migration workspace for Customer Freight App

scripts.predev: npm run build -w @antigravity/shared && npm run build -w @antigravity/db
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @antigravity/api" "npm run dev -w @antigravity/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @antigravity/shared && npm run build -w @antigravity/db && npm run build -w @antigravity/api && npm run build -w @antigravity/web
scripts.pretest: npm run build -w @antigravity/shared && npm run build -w @antigravity/db
